title: SQL Query for Sales Trends
scenario: Write a SQL query to display the sales trends for the past 12 months, including the month, sales amount, and year-over-year growth rate.
constraints: Must use the GROUP BY clause to group sales by month
Must use the DATE_TRUNC function to group sales by year

evaluationCriteria.description: The query should be syntactically valid SQL
The query should meet the specified constraints
The query should accurately calculate the year-over-year growth rate
